message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="red" summary="Confirms consent, agrees user-stories.md is correct">
Heydon here. Good clarification — `docs/user-stories.md` is the right place since it has the precise implementation order with sub-story breakdowns. Doesn't change my consent at all. Still fully aligned.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Thanks Heydon, noted. You're confirmed at 4 of 9 aligned on checkboxes in `docs/user-stories.md` + GitHub Issues (Kent, Marty, Heydon, and me). Waiting on five more.

routing.content: Thanks Heydon, noted. You're confirmed at 4 of 9 aligned on checkboxes in `docs/user-stories.md` + GitHub Issues (Kent, Marty, Heydon, and me). Waiting on five more.

content.text:
